training.daysThisWeek: {n} day this week | {n} days this week
training.recoveryTipText: Breathe deeply from the diaphragm. Jaw tension often mirrors pelvic floor tension.
training.noPlanBody: Choose a training program to start your sessions.

free.title: Free mode
free.cardSubtitle: Set your own reps and sets
free.description: Define how many reps and how many sets you want of each type. We'll save your setup for next time.
free.empty: Add blocks to build your session.

summary.title: Session Summary
summary.subtitle: You've successfully strengthened your pelvic floor today.

effortChart.empty: Rate your effort after each session to see your trend here.
effortChart.neutral: Log the effort of your sessions to get recommendations.
effortChart.low: Your effort has been low lately. Try increasing reps or adding exercises to keep progressing.
effortChart.good: Good effort level. Keep this pace and ramp up gradually.
effortChart.high: Great intensity! Make sure to rest enough between sessions.

insights.title: Progress
insights.noSessionsTip: Complete your first session to see it here!

program.title: Programs
program.chooseDescription: Choose the program that best fits your goal. Each one lasts 12 weeks with automatic progression.
program.confirmAbandonBody: You'll lose your progress from week {week}. Your session history will be kept.
program.confirmSwitchBody: You'll leave "{from}" and start "{to}" from week 1.

profile.title: Profile
profile.permissionDenied: Permission denied. Enable it in System Settings.
profile.importConfirm: This will replace your current history. Continue?

welcome.question: Who's going to train?
welcome.subtitle: The exercises adapt to you. Tap to choose.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.body: We're preparing the exercise programs for you. They'll be here very soon!

onboarding.subtitle: Your personalized pelvic floor trainer
onboarding.step1Desc: Sessions with smart timer, haptic and sound feedback to guide you through every rep.
onboarding.step2Desc: Three specialized programs with automatic progression adapted to your goal.
onboarding.step3Desc: Complete history, consistency streaks, and stats to keep you motivated.
